center.name: 塞伦盖蒂国家公园
center.summary: 塞伦盖蒂国家公园是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括D'Arnaud's barbet、White-headed buffalo weaver，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: D'Arnaud's barbet (Trachyphonus darnaudii) is a species of bird in the family Lybiidae that is found in East Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: boehmiSerengeti National Park, Tanzania | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | parent_authority = Reichenbach, 1863 | taxon = Dinemellia dinemelli | authority = (Rüppell, 1845) }} The white-headed buffalo weaver or white-faced buffalo-weaver (Dinemellia dinemelli) is a species of passerine bird in the family Ploceidae native to East Africa. The buffalo part of its name derives from its habit of following the African buffalo, feeding on disturbed insects. Two subspecies are recognized
